On this page Overview What went wrong? Learn Astro with Coding in Public 150+ video lessons • Astro v5 ready Get 20% off MDX integration missing. MdxIntegrationMissingError : Unable to render FILE. Ensure that the @astrojs/mdx integration is installed. What went wrong? Section titled “What went wrong?” Unable to find the official @astrojs/mdx integration. This error is raised when using MDX files without an MDX integration installed.
